data.name: Banisher Of Lust
data.detailed_description:
Banisher Of Lust is an interactive adventure where you take on the role of a priest striving to free the sinful soul of a young woman. Immerse yourself in a dark atmosphere, where every choice affects the fate of the girl and her purification.

ABOUT THE GAME:


A rainy evening, church bells, a misty atmosphere, and a girl named Evelyn who barely steps into the church. With silver hair and a seductive gaze, she approaches the priest, confessing that she feels tainted, unable to control her desires.

Father Gavriel, determined to help, faces temptation. Enchanted by her unimaginable body and tempting curves, he begins his path of purification, delving into the secret corners of her soul.

What awaits you in the Story Mode:

  • Dive into intimate conversations with Evelyn, uncovering her most secret desires;
  • Make complex and intriguing choices that will determine the girl's fate;
  • Interact with her body, where every action matters;
  • Perform the act of purification, deciding who will take on the role of her savior;
  • Become her spiritual mentor, offering her a path to cleansing and new goals;
  • A collection of "Romantic Postcards" featuring Evelyn in her most intimate and revealing poses.

Banisher Of Lust is a journey into sin, temptation, and purification, where each choice echoes in the souls of the characters. Walk the path with Evelyn to help her find the way to salvation or fall into the abyss of desire.

What awaits you in Free Mode:

  • Character Creation: Create your own female character, fully under your control.
  • New Story Branch: The character will have a unique storyline with exclusive events.
  • 12 New Sex Scenes: Unique animations and scenes, only available in this mode.
  • Full Control: The ability to fully control the process, experiencing maximum interactive pleasure.

This new mode offers more freedom and opens many additional opportunities for players who seek a unique and personalized experience. Discover a new way to indulge and create the character of your dreams!

data.short_description: A rainy evening, church bells, a slightly wet girl named Evelyn and the holy father Gabriel, ready to confess the sinner in all positions.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 波蘭文, 俄文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 日文, 德文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 3.0 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVidia GeForce GTX 660 2GB
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
